scripts.build: pnpm --filter @dataprofile/web build && pnpm --filter @dataprofile/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @dataprofile/shared-ui build && pnpm --filter @dataprofile/shared-worker-runtime build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @dataprofile/web lint && pnpm --filter @dataprofile/shared-types lint && pnpm --filter @dataprofile/shared-ui lint && pnpm --filter @dataprofile/shared-worker-runtime lint
scripts.test:worker-coverage: cd apps/worker && python3 -m pytest --cov=src --cov-report=json:coverage.json --cov-report=term-missing tests && python3 ../../scripts/validate_worker_coverage.py coverage.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @dataprofile/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @dataprofile/shared-types typecheck && pnpm --filter @dataprofile/shared-ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @dataprofile/shared-worker-runtime typecheck
